name: Standard King or Twin Room with French Balcony
desc: A refined retreat with French balcony, offering warm oak tones and soft natural light — the perfect opening scene.

name: Deluxe King or Twin Room
desc: A generous canvas of comfort with elegant interiors that frame your stay like a cinematic masterpiece.

name: Superior Double or Twin Room with City View
desc: Elevated space with panoramic city views — Tbilisi's skyline becomes your personal backdrop.

name: Superior Large Double or Twin Room
desc: Spacious and refined, where every detail is considered — from handpicked Georgian art to Italian linens.

name: King Room - Disability Access
desc: Thoughtfully designed for full accessibility without compromising on luxury or cinematic ambiance.

name: Superior King Room
desc: A commanding space with king-size comfort, where Georgian artistry meets modern elegance.

name: Superior Double Room
desc: Refined double accommodation with premium finishes and a curated sense of cinematic calm.

name: Junior Suite Room
desc: A private screening room of your own — separate living area with panoramic Old Tbilisi views.

name: Executive Suite Room
desc: The director's cut — our most lavish accommodation with wrap-around terrace and private study.
